description_long: This is a modern, multi-story residential house complex featuring two main structures separated by a central driveway. The buildings are characterized by clean, rectilinear forms, large floor-to-ceiling windows, and flat roofs, giving the property a contemporary aesthetic. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, likely concrete or stucco, with some sections accented by stone or wood paneling. The landscaped grounds include manicured lawns, flower beds, palm trees, a swimming pool, and a shaded gazebo, creating a luxurious outdoor environment. Balconies and terraces are present on the upper floors, providing outdoor living spaces with views of the garden. The overall design emphasizes openness, natural light, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, multi-story house complex with flat roofs, large windows, landscaped gardens, a pool, and a central driveway. The design features clean lines, outdoor terraces, and a luxurious contemporary style.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the rear and side of the house complex, highlighting the pool, gazebo, and extensive garden landscaping.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front facade with the main driveway, entryways, and prominent balconies, emphasizing the house's modern symmetry.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the opposite side, revealing more of the garden, the back of the buildings, and additional green space.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the rear and side elevations, showing the secondary entry points, window arrangements, and the separation between the two main structures.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways are recessed with large glass doors, minimal steps, and no porch; clean lines and overhangs emphasize the modern style.
